author: Testpress
description: Simplicrack is an online platform providing educational resources and mock tests for government competitive exams, including Staff Selection Commission (SSC) and Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) exams. The app offers features like online lectures, study materials, mock tests, and detailed performance analytics to help students prepare and improve their skills for exams such as SSC CGL, RRB NTPC, and various State-level, Banking, and Teaching examinations
